title: practical english usage - Part 221

adverbial expressions; some are conjunctions. For differences in punctuation discourse markers in speech, ►    301. Most discourse markers are adverbs or speech. Those that are most common in writing are discussed here; for of discourse, some mostly in formal writing, and others mainly in informal to sum  up). English has a very large number of these. Some are used in all kinds exchanges and written text (e.g. first of all, on the other hand, in any case, Discourse markers are words and expressions which  help to structure spoken 284 discourse       markers      in  writing     _____________ grammar •  284  discourse markers in writing most winters are relatively mild.                     -> England has occasional heavy snowfalls in January and February. However, had a happy childhood.

Their father died when they were small. In spite of that / Despite that, they they made remarkable progress in mathematics.

The Greeks and Romans had no symbol for zero. Nevertheless/Nonetheless, however; in spite of this/that showing              a   contrast: nevertheless; nonetheless; despite this/that; yet; events that never happened.

Just as some children have imaginary friends, others invent complicated past same way, India and China are dependent on rice.

Russia relies on its grain harvests to feed its population. Similarly / In the showing              similarity: similarly; in the same way; just as to write a sequel.

His first novel was a remarkable success. a result, he was offered a contract Therefore we are unable to offer you a place.

Atmospheric pressure is lower at altitude. Consequently, climbers can find it as a result; so; then showing              a   logical           or    causal           connection: consequently; therefore; each other.

Central European languages, except for / apart from Hungarian, are related to and deciduous.

Broadly speaking trees can be divided into two groups: evergreen To some extent, people's religious views tend to reflect those of their parents.

less likely he or she is to be arrested, prosecuted and (if prosecuted) On  the whole / In general, the higher an individual is in the social strata the On  the whole / In general, people like to help others.

apart from; except for to some extent; in general; in all/most/many/some cases; broadly speaking; generalising                     and       exceptions: on the whole; to a great extent; Some discourse markers make it clear what kind of communication is going on.
